# NEM Life

> NEM Life helpt mensen hardnekkige patronen doorbreken met de NEM Methode — een concrete, stapsgewijze aanpak zonder eindeloos praten.

NEM Life is a psychology-based brand founded by Christel Reus. The NEM Method (Neuro Emotional Mastery) is a structured 3-pillar approach that helps people break recurring emotional and behavioural patterns and find clarity.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://nemlife.com/): Overview of NEM Life, the NEM Method, and how it works.
- [NEM Methode](https://nemlife.com/nem-methode): Detailed explanation of the 3-pillar methodology — Neuro, Emotional, Mastery.
- [Onze Missie](https://nemlife.com/missie-nem-life): Why NEM Life exists — the founders' story and mission.
- [Inzichten (Blog)](https://nemlife.com/inzichten): Articles and insights on patterns, emotions, and personal growth.
- [Ervaringen (Testimonials)](https://nemlife.com/ervaringen): Real experiences from people who have worked with NEM Life.
- [Christel Reus](https://nemlife.com/link-in-bio/christel): Therapist, entrepreneur, and developer of the NEM Method.

## What NEM Life offers

- **NEM Methode**: A structured 3-step approach to breaking emotional patterns
  - **Neuro**: Understanding how your brain creates and maintains patterns
  - **Emotional**: Learning to recognise and redirect emotional responses
  - **Mastery**: Building new patterns that stick — concrete, applicable, lasting
- **Therapy sessions**: Individual and couples therapy using the NEM Method
- **Blog insights**: Articles on emotional patterns, relationships, and personal development

## Key facts

- Founded by Christel Reus
- Based in the Netherlands
- Primary language: Dutch (nl)
- Approach: Psychology-based, structured, practical — not traditional talk therapy
- Target audience: People stuck in recurring emotional/behavioural patterns seeking clarity
